A '''Yinchorri starfighter''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] during their expansion in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]. Such fighters required one pilot and were armed with a heavy [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] and a medium blaster cannon. These vessels also had two sublight accelerators.

They were not actually built by or for the Yinchorri, but stolen from the [[Golden Nyss Shipyards]].

{{Ship-stub}}
